extra.reason: Root AGENTS.md cleaned up and reformatted.
Fixed Axios content-type header narrowing and verified focused adapter test plus just check.

Implemented bounded /api/scrape validation for http(s) target URLs, allowed proxy protocols, timeout range, user-agent length, XPath length/pattern/start, and generic sanitized 400 responses. Verified with focused route tests and just check.
Direct Go E2E package tests now skip clearly outside the orchestrator while orchestrated runs still execute.
Active GitHub CI workflow restored and focused workflow verification passed.
Hashed rate-limit identifiers; raw bearer tokens and forwarded IPs are no longer stored or logged; focused verification passed.
Login redirects now normalize to local dashboard paths and focused route tests pass.
Dashboard CSRF propagation fixed and focused verification passed.
Removed dashboard inline event handlers and verified rendered dashboard pages have no inline scripts or event handlers.
Explicit proxyDetails now reaches browser load options and focused engine test passes.
Hardened XPath parsing and validation with focused tests passing.

Implemented corrupt storage handling in commit c812fb8. FsKnownSitesAdapter and stats storage now handle malformed files with controlled quarantine/recovery behavior and focused tests. Verified with targeted storage tests and just check in worker.

Implemented VictoriaLogs OTLP logging in commit 83b19ad. Added OTLP config, OpenTelemetry log export, redaction, flush/shutdown hooks, and focused config/logger tests. Verified targeted tests and typecheck in worker.

After dashboard CSRF and inline handler fixes, nix develop --command just test completed successfully. The orchestrator reported all 28 tests cached and passing, covering the previously failing TestDashboardSitesRenders.
Implemented unique temp files for known-sites and stats storage writes; focused storage tests pass.
Verified saved site and request user-agent/header propagation to browser load options.
Known-site domain lookup now normalizes www/case/trailing dots, applies root domains to subdomains, rejects unrelated domains, and focused tests pass.
Split app factory, runtime bootstrap, process handlers, and server start; added focused app factory tests.
Application console cleanup now routes through logger facade; focused logger tests and typecheck passed.
All 4 child issues are closed and verification baseline is restored: typecheck passes, direct Go E2E behavior is clear, CI is enabled, and the dashboard sites E2E passes through just test.
All 5 child issues are closed: CSRF propagation, inline handler removal, local-only login redirects, hashed rate-limit identifiers, and bounded API scrape validation are complete and verified.
Centralized runtime defaults in src/constants.ts, aligned displayed version sources to package.json, and documented the source of truth.

Centralized dashboard middleware policy in a shared route helper, applied it across dashboard index/sites/stats routes, and verified GET/POST/DELETE/SSE behavior with src/routes/dashboard/csrf.test.ts plus project typecheck.
Obscura simple-fetch fast path added with Puppeteer fallback and focused verification passing.
Centralized secret key loading for flat and api_keys YAML formats, aligned Nix exports, docs, and focused tests.
Moved embedded article extraction into a tested core helper and removed it from BrowserPort/Puppeteer adapter.
Scrape outcome writes are centralized behind scrape-events service; focused tests and typecheck pass.
Browser waits and noisy browser output are centralized in config with ADR-017 safeguards; focused tests and typecheck pass.

All six runtime centralization children are closed: logging/OTLP, logger facade, startup bootstrap, defaults/version sources, route middleware policy, and secrets/config schema are implemented and verified.
All four storage/data integrity children are closed: corrupt-file handling, unique temp writes, domain semantics, and centralized scrape outcome writes are implemented and verified.

All six scraping/browser children are closed: Obscura fast path, headers/user-agent, proxy override, embedded extraction ownership, XPath parsing, and browser wait/console configuration are implemented and verified.
Completed and verified in tmux Phase 6 focused checks.
Completed and verified in tmux Phase 6 focused checks.
Completed and verified in tmux Phase 6 focused checks.
Completed and verified in tmux Phase 6 focused checks.
Updated testing/urls_for_testing.txt and verified with Obscura sampling.
Phase 6 cleanup/docs work completed and final verification passed.
Deep audit remediation completed and verified.
No code change needed; user converted secrets key to lowercase supported by existing config.
VictoriaLogs OTLP path fixed and verified with MCP protobuf probe.
Dev server verified in VictoriaLogs, URL-list scrapes completed, failures inspected in VictoriaLogs, and ADR updated.
Implemented default SOCKS5 proxy handling and explicit DataDome proxy error reporting; focused tests and just check/build/test pass.
Added failed-URL artifact and just test-urls-failed retry path; validation passed.
Centralized secret loading through wrapper and blocked encrypted SOPS literals from runtime config.
Preserved SOCKS proxy scheme for Chromium, enabled VictoriaLogs by default, documented testing protocol, and verified reruns/logs.
